one_time_description: Large Government of Canada transfer recorded in Administration segment - likely Trans Mountain pipeline or treaty-related payment; also Trans Mountain revenue of $3,865,127 in Own Source Revenue segment
economic_notes: Nation has equity investments in Shxw'owhamel Ventures Limited Partnership (SVLP, 99.9% owned) and Shxw'owhamel Ventures GP Ltd (SVGP, 100% owned), both accounted for by modified equity method. SVLP had revenues of $2,755,507 and net loss of $502,525 for year ended December 31, 2019. BCFN Gaming revenue of $280,780. Trans Mountain revenue of $3,865,127. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Very large one-time Government of Canada transfer of $21,429,286 recorded in Administration segment drove the $15.5M surplus vs $187K prior year. Trans Mountain revenue of $3,865,127 also appears non-recurring. These two items together represent ~$25M of the $29M total revenue. Two GBEs (SVLP and SVGP) accounted for by modified equity method and excluded from consolidation. SVLP recorded a net loss of $502,525. Deferred income of $540,324 from prior year was recognized as ISC revenue per Note 13. Prior year (2019) comparatives were audited by a different auditor. No schedule of remuneration provided. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact.
